Name: AiP - Request Appeal Reasons
Description: Direct the appellant to submit their Appeal Reasons.

Name: Submit reasons for appeal
Description: Submit reasons for appeal from appellant

Name: AiP - Ask clarifying questions
Description: Direct the appellant to answer clarifying questions

Name: Force case - case under review
Description: Force case to case under review

Name: Force case - hearing reqs
Description: Force case to submit hearing requirements

Name: Update payment status
PostConditionState: appealSubmitted(journeyType!="aip" AND paymentStatus="Paid" AND appealType!="protection" AND appealType!="revocationOfProtection" AND appealType!="deprivation"):1;*

Name: Pay and submit
Description: Pay and submit - event added back in for legacy inflight cases support

Name: Handle hearing exception
Description: Handles hearing exception necessary for triggering WA task

Name: Trigger CMR Updated
Description: Trigger CMR updated notification necessary for triggering WA task

Name: Trigger CMR Listed
Description: System event to trigger Send CMR notification work allocation task

Name: Trigger Review Interpreter
Description: System event to trigger Review Interpreter Booking work allocation task

Name: Decision w/o hearing Listed
Description: System event to update case data when an on-papers hearing is listed

Name: Re-trigger Task For Case IDs
Description: For starting the event to Re-triggering all necessary WA tasks

Name: Remove Case Manager bulk
Description: For removing case-manager role from cases by ID

Name: Update next hearing info
Description: Event to update next hearing date

Name: Hearing Cancelled
Description: Event to update case data after hearing is cancelled

Name: CMR Listing
Description: System event to update case data after CMR listing

Name: CMR Re-Listing
Description: System event to update case data after CMR re-listing

Name: Revoke case access
Description: Revoke legal representative or Appellant case access

Name: Manage Case TTL
Description: suspend or resume TTL for case

Name: Appellant in Person - Manual
Description: Update the case to Appellant in Person - Manual

Name: Update detention location
Description: Update the location where the appellant is detained

Name: Remove Detained Status
Description: Marking appellant as no longer in detention

Name: Force decided state
Description: Move the appeal to the appeal decided state
EventEnablingCondition: [STATE]!="appealStarted" AND [STATE]!="appealStartedByAdmin" AND isRehydratedAppeal="Yes" AND isAdmin="Yes" AND hasBeenDecided!="Yes"

Name: Force FTPA decided state
Description: Move the appeal to the appeal FTPA decided state
EventEnablingCondition: [STATE]!="appealStarted" AND [STATE]!="appealStartedByAdmin" AND isRehydratedAppeal="Yes" AND isAdmin="Yes" AND hasBeenFtpaDecided!="Yes"
